# Pulse Personal Training

> Personal training studio in Highland, IL for busy moms. Get strong, confident, and
> energized through exercise, simple nutrition, and real accountability. Locally owned
> and coaching Highland since 2007.

## Key facts
- Business: Pulse Personal Training
- Location: 815 Broadway, Highland, IL 62249 (next to the downtown square)
- Phone / text: 618-792-8250
- Email: jeff@pulse-training.com
- Founded: 2007
- Audience: busy moms who want to make their own health a priority
- Approach: exercise + simple nutrition + 1-on-1 accountability; beginner-friendly; sustainable, no fad diets
- Signature program: The Mom Life Transformation
- Coaches: Jeff Weinacht (Founder & Head Coach), Tina Greenwald (Coach & Gym Manager), Josh Leckrone (Coach)

## Offerings
- Free, no-pressure discovery call (primary call to action)
- 1-on-1 personal training for women and busy moms
- Nutrition coaching, accountability coaching, strength training, sustainable weight loss

## Areas served
Highland, Marine, Grantfork, St. Jacob, Troy, and Edwardsville, Illinois.

## Links
- Homepage: https://www.pulse-training.com/
